exec_summary: SEA Fintech Pte can enhance its cybersecurity posture and achieve compliance with MAS TRM guidelines through our MXDR — Essential service, addressing inadequate threat detection and response capabilities. By partnering with SISA, SEA Fintech can leverage our expertise to bridge the security resource gap and navigate regulatory complexities, including SGX listing rules. Our managed detection and response capability will enable SEA Fintech to respond swiftly to emerging threats, protecting its sensitive financial data and reputation. With SISA as a trusted partner, SEA Fintech can focus on driving business growth while ensuring the security and integrity of its operations.
